jokes.text: Dee eating month-old trash cake while smoking
jokes.setup: Character is found eating cake, which seems normal
jokes.punchline: It's revealed to be month-old trash cake
jokes.explanation: Perfect character moment establishing Dee's rock bottom state through disgusting visual behavior

dialogue.line: Dee eating month-old trash cake while smoking

jokes.text: The gang trying to roast Dee but she keeps completing their insults
jokes.setup: The gang starts their usual bird roasts of Dee
jokes.punchline: Dee anticipates and completes every insult, deflating their fun
jokes.explanation: Brilliant subversion of the show's running gag by having the victim participate, showing character growth

dialogue.speaker: Mac
dialogue.line: Dee, you're such a—

dialogue.speaker: Dee
dialogue.line: —bird? Yeah, I know.

dialogue.speaker: Charlie
dialogue.line: And you're always so—

dialogue.speaker: Dee
dialogue.line: —stupid and annoying? Got it.

dialogue.speaker: Mac
dialogue.line: You never even let us finish!

dialogue.speaker: Dee
dialogue.line: Because I know exactly what you're going to say. I'm a tall, gangly, uncoordinated bird who can't do anything right.

jokes.text: I might as well just throw myself in front of a bus though, because I'm so ugly I can't even get a bus to hit on me
jokes.setup: Dee talking about throwing herself in front of a bus
jokes.punchline: Pivot to 'hit on me' - buses won't even hit on her romantically
jokes.explanation: Excellent wordplay with perfect economy - takes suicide joke and lands on self-deprecating romance joke

dialogue.speaker: Dee
dialogue.line: I might as well just throw myself in front of a bus though, because I'm so ugly I can't even get a bus to hit on me

jokes.text: 'We're gonna sign you up for an open mic night at a comedy club!' as their solution to Dee's depression
jokes.setup: They claim to want to help Dee with her depression
jokes.punchline: Their solution is putting her in the most humiliating situation possible
jokes.explanation: Good character comedy showing their complete lack of empathy disguised as help

dialogue.line: We're gonna sign you up for an open mic night at a comedy club!

jokes.text: You're right in that sweet spot between suicidal and actually dead, where most comedians thrive
jokes.setup: Mac explaining why comedy will help Dee
jokes.punchline: Comedians thrive in the suicidal zone
jokes.explanation: Dark but insightful comedy observation delivered with casual cruelty

dialogue.speaker: Mac
dialogue.line: You're right in that sweet spot between suicidal and actually dead, where most comedians thrive

jokes.text: Dennis's plan to find Dee 'a very, very average if not below average man to take you off of our hands forever'
jokes.setup: Dennis offers to help Dee find love
jokes.punchline: He wants to pawn her off on any willing loser
jokes.explanation: Perfect Dennis narcissism - even his 'help' is entirely self-serving

dialogue.speaker: Dennis
dialogue.line: a very, very average if not below average man to take you off of our hands forever

jokes.text: I passed out at the park the other day, and a couple of kids wrote, 'Wash me' in the filth on my vagina
jokes.setup: Dee explaining why she stopped showering
jokes.punchline: Kids writing 'Wash me' on her like a dirty car, but on her genitals
jokes.explanation: Disgusting but brilliantly constructed - takes familiar 'wash me' car joke to horrifying new territory

dialogue.speaker: Dee
dialogue.line: I passed out at the park the other day, and a couple of kids wrote, 'Wash me' in the filth on my vagina

jokes.text: I can't even get a bus to hit on me
jokes.setup: Dee repeating her earlier joke at the open mic
jokes.punchline: Same bus/hit on wordplay
jokes.explanation: Effective callback showing her developing this into material

dialogue.speaker: Dee
dialogue.line: I can't even get a bus to hit on me

jokes.text: Joke's on me
jokes.setup: Dee finishing her bit
jokes.punchline: Her new catchphrase
jokes.explanation: Simple but effective catchphrase that becomes central to the episode

dialogue.speaker: Dee
dialogue.line: Joke's on me

jokes.text: Dennis's reaction to the talent scout: 'You're not on my list of chosen men'
jokes.setup: Talent scout approaches Dee
jokes.punchline: Dennis treats him like a dating candidate he's rejecting
jokes.explanation: Perfect Dennis control freak behavior - everything must go through his system

dialogue.speaker: Dennis
dialogue.line: You're not on my list of chosen men

jokes.text: This one's just like one big chin
jokes.setup: Dennis showing Dee his selected men
jokes.punchline: One candidate is apparently just a massive chin
jokes.explanation: Absurd physical description suggesting Dennis's standards are very low

dialogue.speaker: Dennis
dialogue.line: This one's just like one big chin

jokes.text: He's got all of his skin, still
jokes.setup: Dennis asking what Dee finds attractive about Snyder
jokes.punchline: Having skin is apparently a notable positive
jokes.explanation: Brilliantly low bar for attractiveness, delivered with perfect deadpan timing

dialogue.speaker: Dennis
dialogue.line: He's got all of his skin, still

jokes.text: And that he has plenty of teeth to get... But not all of them?
jokes.setup: Dee continuing to describe Snyder's 'attractive' qualities
jokes.punchline: He's missing some teeth, which is somehow still positive
jokes.explanation: Good escalation of the low standards joke

dialogue.speaker: Dee
dialogue.line: And that he has plenty of teeth to get... But not all of them?

jokes.text: What are you doing? / Sound effects.
jokes.setup: Dee making random sound effects
jokes.punchline: Matter-of-fact explanation that she's doing 'sound effects'
jokes.explanation: Simple absurdist moment with good deadpan delivery from Dee.

dialogue.speaker: Dennis
dialogue.line: What are you doing?

dialogue.speaker: Dee
dialogue.line: Sound effects.

jokes.text: Dee making random sound effects
jokes.setup: Dee practicing her comedy routine
jokes.punchline: She's doing terrible, random sound effects
jokes.explanation: Shows Dee's terrible comedy instincts but not particularly clever

jokes.text: This is Walt. Yeah, shut up, Walt
jokes.setup: Dennis introducing Walt
jokes.punchline: Immediately dismisses him rudely
jokes.explanation: Perfect Dennis cruelty and control dynamics

dialogue.speaker: Dennis
dialogue.line: This is Walt.

dialogue.speaker: Dennis
dialogue.line: Yeah, shut up, Walt

jokes.text: The stink flipped around and now my soap smells like dirty vag
jokes.setup: Dee talking about taking a shower
jokes.punchline: She's so dirty she contaminated the soap
jokes.explanation: Disgusting but well-constructed reversal joke

dialogue.speaker: Dee
dialogue.line: The stink flipped around and now my soap smells like dirty vag

jokes.text: A woman said 'vagina.' That's what makes it funny!
jokes.setup: Audience reaction to Dee's material
jokes.punchline: They're laughing just because she said 'vagina'
jokes.explanation: Good meta-commentary on lowbrow humor appreciation

dialogue.line: A woman said 'vagina.' That's what makes it funny!

jokes.text: I can't even keep crabs in this vagina. They're all like, 'Clickety clackety, clickety clackety, clickety clackety clack. I got to get out of here!' Evacuate vagina
jokes.setup: Dee talking about men leaving her
jokes.punchline: Even STD crabs evacuate her vagina with sound effects
jokes.explanation: Disgusting but creative personification of crabs with military evacuation

dialogue.speaker: Dee
dialogue.line: I can't even keep crabs in this vagina. They're all like, 'Clickety clackety, clickety clackety, clickety clackety clack. I got to get out of here!' Evacuate vagina

jokes.text: The crabs have machine guns
jokes.setup: Crabs making machine gun sounds
jokes.punchline: Audience member explaining the sound effects
jokes.explanation: Absurd escalation but not particularly clever

dialogue.line: The crabs have machine guns

jokes.text: I'd like to say it was fun, but I've had a better time ripping out my own pubes. Shellac, shellac, rip! Ping, ping, ping, ow!
jokes.setup: Dee ending her set
jokes.punchline: Compares performance to self-harm with sound effects
jokes.explanation: Appropriately gross closer with unnecessary sound effects

dialogue.speaker: Dee
dialogue.line: I'd like to say it was fun, but I've had a better time ripping out my own pubes. Shellac, shellac, rip! Ping, ping, ping, ow!

jokes.text: That was a funny white bitch, wasn't it? Skinny though. I took bigger dumps than her
jokes.setup: Headliner commenting on Dee's set
jokes.punchline: Crude comparison to his bowel movements
jokes.explanation: Establishes Landslide as crude but not particularly clever

dialogue.line: That was a funny white bitch, wasn't it? Skinny though. I took bigger dumps than her

jokes.text: I'm not on a list for a place that I don't want to be
jokes.setup: Dennis can't get into the green area
jokes.punchline: Claims not wanting to be somewhere he's excluded from
jokes.explanation: Perfect Dennis narcissistic defense mechanism

dialogue.speaker: Dennis
dialogue.line: I'm not on a list for a place that I don't want to be

jokes.text: Dennis repeatedly calling Dee's name with increasing desperation while she ignores him
jokes.setup: Dennis tries to get Dee's attention normally
jokes.punchline: He escalates to childish repetition of her name
jokes.explanation: Good escalation showing Dennis's childish nature when he doesn't get attention

dialogue.speaker: Dennis
dialogue.line: Dee. Dee. Dee. Dee. Dee.

jokes.text: Dennis, you're out
jokes.setup: The gang wants to come backstage
jokes.punchline: Dee specifically excludes Dennis
jokes.explanation: Great power reversal - Dee finally has something Dennis wants

dialogue.speaker: Dee
dialogue.line: Dennis, you're out

jokes.text: You will never succeed. Ever. Instead, you will fly too close to the sun, and you will choke and you will gag in a spectacular manner
jokes.setup: Dennis trying to convince Dee to take Walt
jokes.punchline: Elaborate mythological prediction of her failure
jokes.explanation: Perfectly dramatic Dennis manipulation with classical references

dialogue.speaker: Dennis
dialogue.line: You will never succeed. Ever. Instead, you will fly too close to the sun, and you will choke and you will gag in a spectacular manner

jokes.text: I love you, Dee
jokes.setup: Dennis's desperate plea continues
jokes.punchline: Forces himself to say he loves his sister
jokes.explanation: Shows how much Dennis's ego is threatened by having to admit feelings

dialogue.speaker: Dennis
dialogue.line: I love you, Dee

jokes.text: Dennis... suck my dick
jokes.setup: Dennis's emotional plea for reconciliation
jokes.punchline: Dee's crude, dismissive response
jokes.explanation: Perfect comic timing and brutal rejection of Dennis's manipulation

dialogue.speaker: Dee
dialogue.line: Dennis... suck my dick

jokes.text: We got you, Dee! We tricked you, we tricked you, we tricked you!
jokes.setup: The big reveal of the prank
jokes.punchline: Mac's gleeful repetition shows their cruel satisfaction
jokes.explanation: Shows the gang's childish cruelty in their moment of victory

dialogue.speaker: Mac
dialogue.line: We got you, Dee! We tricked you, we tricked you, we tricked you!

jokes.text: I chartered a jet. We flew all over Philadelphia for six hours
jokes.setup: Revealing the scope of the prank
jokes.punchline: They spent massive money and time just to fool Dee
jokes.explanation: Brilliant reveal of how elaborate and wasteful their cruelty was

dialogue.speaker: Frank
dialogue.line: I chartered a jet. We flew all over Philadelphia for six hours

jokes.text: And I'm a garbage man. He's a garbage man! He's your garbage man! You've met him
jokes.setup: Revealing Snyder's fake identity
jokes.punchline: He's literally her garbage man she already knows
jokes.explanation: Perfect humiliating revelation - her 'talent scout' is literally trash-adjacent

dialogue.speaker: Snyder
dialogue.line: And I'm a garbage man.

dialogue.speaker: Frank
dialogue.line: He's a garbage man! He's your garbage man! You've met him

jokes.text: Dennis wasn't even in on any of it! He wasn't, he wasn't. No, we knew we had to drag him through the mud, make it seem legit
jokes.setup: Explaining the full scope of the prank
jokes.punchline: They had to make Dennis suffer too for authenticity
jokes.explanation: Brilliant meta-joke about sacrificing Dennis's ego for the greater prank

dialogue.speaker: Mac
dialogue.line: Dennis wasn't even in on any of it! He wasn't, he wasn't. No, we knew we had to drag him through the mud, make it seem legit

jokes.text: Some things you just don't joke about, okay? Yeah, yeah, yeah. You took it too far
jokes.setup: Dee asking why they did this elaborate prank
jokes.punchline: They claim SHE took things too far with suicide jokes
jokes.explanation: Perfect hypocrisy - they claim moral high ground after elaborate psychological torture

dialogue.speaker: Mac
dialogue.line: Some things you just don't joke about, okay?

dialogue.speaker: Charlie
dialogue.line: Yeah, yeah, yeah. You took it too far

jokes.text: I took it too far? Oh, God, you sons of bitches!
jokes.setup: Dee processing their justification
jokes.punchline: Her explosive realization of their hypocrisy
jokes.explanation: Good payoff for her realization of their twisted logic

dialogue.speaker: Dee
dialogue.line: I took it too far? Oh, God, you sons of bitches!

jokes.text: And there she goes! She's back!
jokes.setup: Dee storming off in rage
jokes.punchline: Mac celebrating their success at breaking and restoring her
jokes.explanation: Shows their satisfaction at returning to the status quo

dialogue.speaker: Mac
dialogue.line: And there she goes! She's back!

jokes.text: He's not loving it. He's not. He's not loving it. No, he's not. He might go kill himself
jokes.setup: Dennis leaving after claiming he's fine
jokes.punchline: They casually note he might commit suicide
jokes.explanation: Dark callback showing they learned nothing from their lesson about suicide jokes

dialogue.line: He's not loving it. He's not. He's not loving it. No, he's not. He might go kill himself
